name: contracted-loops
description: Loop engineering as contracts: loopspec format (goal/invariant/iterate/verify/evidence/stop/budget/escalation), lifecycle skills (loop-start/check/close, gap-capture), audit subagents (stop-condition-auditor, parity-checker, loop-warden), and enforcement hooks - distilled from a real 21-phase LangGraph-to-EKS project's incident history.
author: SrikanthArgp
_note: Manifest shape is illustrative against this Claude Code install (2026-07-19); verify field names via `claude plugin --help` before publishing. See PACKAGING.md for the generic/project-specific split - two of the four hooks are project-specific and should be dropped or adapted when porting.
